understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without landing on spike tiles `u`/`v`.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT shifts horizontally, then gravity pulls until landing; CLICK removes breakable blocks `x` at target positions; spikes end the run; each level allows 2 attempts of 50 steps; UNDO reverses the last action.
